_comment: Copy this file to ai-config.json and paste your key. ai-config.json is git-ignored so your key stays private.

_providers.gemini: Free key (no credit card): https://aistudio.google.com/apikey  — leave baseUrl empty.
_providers.openai: Works with OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter. For Groq (free): set baseUrl to https://api.groq.com/openai/v1 and model to llama-3.1-8b-instant, key from https://console.groq.com/keys
